today.prompt: What is one part of your normal day that feels small on the surface but actually holds a lot of your peace together — and why are you more grateful for it than you used to be?
today.note: Open it in the morning from Telegram or come back to it at night from the dashboard without digging through chat.

history.prompt: What is one moment in the last few days when somebody showed up for you, made something lighter, or gave you a break at exactly the right time—and why did that hit harder than it might've looked from the outside?
history.note: Open it in the morning from Telegram or come back to it at night from the dashboard without digging through chat.

history.prompt: What is one object, spot, or creature in your day-to-day world that quietly makes life better every time you notice it — and what would feel missing if it were suddenly gone?
history.note: Open it in the morning from Telegram or come back to it at night from the dashboard without digging through chat.

history.prompt: What is something in your life right now that would have felt impossible, out of reach, or unreal to an older version of you — and why does having it now matter more than you usually admit?
history.note: Open it in the morning from Telegram or come back to it at night from the dashboard without digging through chat.

history.prompt: What’s one person, place, or thing that made you feel quietly supported this week—and what about it hit deeper than usual?
history.responseSummary: Being invited to the Red Wings game mattered less than being thought of and included.

history.prompt: What’s something that could’ve gone sideways lately—but didn’t—and why are you grateful it broke your way?
history.responseSummary: The retro TV guide idea landed well at work and felt like a needed win.

history.prompt: What routine or small habit keeps your days grounded? Think of something reliable that helps you feel steady — even if it's as simple as your morning coffee or a consistent bedtime.
history.responseSummary: Coming home for lunch helps reset and recharge the social battery.

settings.title: Daily gratitude
settings.subtitle: Keep today's prompt visible even when you answer it later at night.
